summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P3 backlog features: (1) Prompt Marketplace - all 24 backend tests passed, frontend UI working with search/sort/tag filters, apply/upvote functionality; (2) Showcase Detail page - file tree, fork CTA, memory section all working; (3) Mobile-responsive IDE - pane switcher (Chat/Workspace) working correctly on mobile viewport, both panes visible on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: Prompts seeding is idempotent - uses upsert by prompt_id, no duplicates on restart
GET /api/prompts (no auth) returns 6 curated prompts with 3 featured=true
Sort options work: popular (upvotes DESC, usage_count DESC), recent (created_at DESC), featured (featured DESC, curated DESC, upvotes DESC)
Search q= filters by title/description/tags with regex-insensitive matching
POST /api/prompts validates: empty title → 400, title > 80 chars → 400, empty body → 400, body > 8000 chars → 400
Upvote toggle works correctly - second call decrements
Apply sets user_settings.system_prompt + applied_prompt_id, increments usage_count
Showcase detail returns file_paths array and fork_count
Mobile pane switcher uses md:hidden/md:flex Tailwind classes correctly
FileTree component uses iterative flattenTree (fixed from recursive version that caused Babel infinite loop)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration_11/12. Created TEST community prompts during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 backlog fully tested: (1) Prompt Marketplace - 6 curated prompts seeded on startup (Stripe-style Engineer, Paranoid Security Auditor, Design-obsessed Frontend Dev, Rust Systems Engineer, Concise Documentation Writer, Kubernetes-native DevOps), 3 featured. All CRUD + upvote/apply working. (2) Showcase Detail - /showcase/:id shows file tree, fork CTA, memory section. Fork increments fork_count. (3) Mobile IDE - [data-testid=mobile-pane-switch] with Chat/Workspace buttons visible on mobile (<768px), hidden on desktop. Panes toggle correctly.

backend: GET /api/prompts?sort=popular sorts by upvotes DESC, usage_count DESC
GET /api/prompts?sort=featured puts featured first, then curated, then upvotes
GET /api/prompts/{prompt_id} returns full prompt with body
POST /api/prompts (authed) creates community prompt with curated=false, featured=false
GET /api/showcase returns public projects with owner_name
Seeding idempotency - curated prompts don't duplicate on restart
frontend: Apply prompt shows toast + Applied badge
/showcase/:id shows title, author, fork_count, file tree, Fork CTA
Fork CTA navigates to new project (or shows 'already own' for own project)
Settings AI tab has 'Browse marketplace' link
Mobile pane switch hidden on desktop

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - all API calls are real
